Work with us
WFS: technology for clean mobility

We are transforming the way the world moves by designing, manufacturing, and supplying systems and components for clean, affordable alternative fuels for road applications. We do this by creating value for our people, our customers, and the environment.

Make a difference at Westport Fuel Systems

Our people are the driving force behind our competitive advantage and growth.

Our team brings together highly qualified and experienced professionals: engineers, production technicians, and business leaders with expertise in alternative fuel systems, combustion technologies, storage systems, electronics, and precision mechanics.

Choosing where to work is a crucial decision!

If you are motivated by innovation, technological leadership, and the vision of a cleaner future for mobility, we invite you to fill out the form.
